name: Regex Match Null Result
description: String.match() or RegExp.exec() result accessed without null check. Returns null when no match found.
smt2Template:
(declare-const match_found Int)
(declare-const result_accessed Int)
(assert (= match_found 0))
(assert (= result_accessed 1))
(check-sat)

teachingExample.explanation: log line match result indexed without null check — crashes on non-matching lines
teachingExample.smt2:
(declare-const line_matches Int)
(declare-const index_accessed Int)
(assert (= line_matches 0))
(assert (= index_accessed 1))
(check-sat)

smt2ProofTemplate:
(declare-const match_found Int)
; Guard: null check before access
(assert (not (= match_found 0)))
; Can match be null?
(assert (= match_found 0))
(check-sat)
; unsat → proven: null check guards match result
